title: Casualties reported
description: At the G7, there were more important topics than world politics. George Melona did the impossible - quit smoking Just an hour ago, the Italian prime minister joked that if she had to give up cigarettes, she would "kill someone." But it seems that there were no victims.
description_en: At the G7, there were more important topics than world politics. George Melona did the impossible - quit smoking Just an hour ago, the Italian prime minister joked that if she had to give up cigarettes, she would "kill someone." But it seems that there were no victims.
description_uk: На G7 были темы поважнее мировой политики. Джорджа Мелони совершила невозможное — бросила курить Еще год назад премьер Италии шутила, что если ей придется отказаться от сигарет, то она «кого-нибудь убьет». Но, похоже, обошлось без жертв.

title: Putin's miracle weapon "Oreshnyk" can miss by dozens of kilometers -...
title_en: Putin's miracle weapon "Oreshnyk" can miss by dozens of kilometers -...
title_uk: Диво-зброя Путіна "Орешник" може промахнутися на десятки кілометрів -...
description: Putin's miracle weapon "Oreshnyk" can miss by dozens of kilometers - investigation by Dallas Analytics Analysts write that the main problem of "Oreshnyk" is hidden in the guidance system. Moreover, the rocket itself turned out to be a kind of "Frankenstein", assembled from fragments of various Soviet programs. One of the key elements of the guidance system — the GU-503 gyroscopic unit — is generally based...
description_en: Putin's miracle weapon "Oreshnyk" can miss by dozens of kilometers - investigation by Dallas Analytics Analysts write that the main problem of "Oreshnyk" is hidden in the guidance system. Moreover, the rocket itself turned out to be a kind of "Frankenstein", assembled from fragments of various Soviet programs. One of the key elements of the guidance system — the GU-503 gyroscopic unit — is generally based...
description_uk: Путинское чудо-оружие «Орешник» может промахиваться на десятки километров, — расследование Dallas Analytics Аналитики пишут, что главная проблема «Орешника» скрывается в системе наведения. Более того, сама ракета оказалась своеобразным «франкенштейном», собранным из фрагментов разных советских программ. Один из ключевых элементов системы наведения — гироскопический блок ГУ-503 — вообще базируется...

title: Kursk: Drone incoming
description: 97 ENEMY TARGETS DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of June 17 (from 18:00 on June 16), the enemy attacked 119 attack UAVs of the Shahed type (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas and "Parody" type simulator drones from the directions: Bryansk, Kursk, Millerovo, Orel - Russian Federation, Chauda - TOT of the Republic of Crimea. The air attack was repelled by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW and unmanned systems units, mobile fire groups...

title: Zaporizhzhia: 1 killed, 7 injured
description: 1 killed, 7 injured as Russia launches drone strikes on Zaporizhzhia. According to Zaporizhzhia Oblast Governor Ivan Fedorov, Russia carried out five strikes on the city, sparking fires and damaging civilian infrastructure.

title: Khmelnytskyi: Casualties reported
description: Ukrainian Su-24 bomber crashes in Khmelnytskyi Oblast, killing pilots, Air Force confirms. The cause and circumstances of the crash are currently under investigation, Ukraine's Air Force said. Rescue crews and law enforcement are currently working at the site, and no civilian casualties have been reported.
description_en: Ukrainian Su-24 bomber crashes in Khmelnytskyi Oblast, killing pilots, Air Force confirms. The cause and circumstances of the crash are currently under investigation, Ukraine's Air Force said. Rescue crews and law enforcement are currently working at the site, and no civilian casualties have been reported.

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Update: Drone strike knocks Moscow oil refinery completely out of action, Reuters reports. The June 16 Ukrainian drone strike on the Moscow Oil Refinery has forced a total halt in its operations, Reuters reported, citing Russian industry sources. The attack sparked a fire and severely damaged a primary refining unit responsible for over half of the plant’s capacity, contradicting claims by local...

title: Grateful to Canada for the new package of sanctions against more than...
title_en: Grateful to Canada for the new package of sanctions against more than...
title_uk: Вдячні Канаді за новий пакет санкцій проти понад...
description: Grateful to Canada for the new package of sanctions against more than 160 entities linked to the Russian shadow fleet. We talked today about increased sanctions pressure on Russia during our meeting with Mark Carney. And it is important that there are such solutions. They also discussed the formats of defense cooperation, Canada's participation in financing the production of Ukrainian drones based on the Danish model, cooperation in the energy sector....
description_en: Grateful to Canada for the new package of sanctions against more than 160 entities linked to the Russian shadow fleet. We talked today about increased sanctions pressure on Russia during our meeting with Mark Carney. And it is important that there are such solutions. They also discussed the formats of defense cooperation, Canada's participation in financing the production of Ukrainian drones based on the Danish model, cooperation in the energy sector....
description_uk: Вдячний Канаді за новий пакет санкцій проти понад 160 субʼєктів, які повʼязані з російським тіньовим флотом. Говорили сьогодні про посилення санкційного тиску на Росію під час нашої зустрічі з Марком Карні. І важливо, що є такі рішення. Обговорили також формати оборонної співпраці, участь Канади у фінансуванні виробництва українських дронів за данською моделлю, співпрацю в енергетичній сфері....

title: Airstrike attack on residential area
description: During a meeting with President Guy Parmelain after his arrival in Geneva, he thanked Switzerland for all the support provided and, in particular, for its willingness to help bring peace closer. Informed Mr. President about constant Russian attacks and our needs to strengthen air defense. He spoke about the situation at the front and Ukrainian long-range sanctions. Our middle strikes and deep strikes quite rightly force Russia...
description_en: During a meeting with President Guy Parmelain after his arrival in Geneva, he thanked Switzerland for all the support provided and, in particular, for its willingness to help bring peace closer. Informed Mr. President about constant Russian attacks and our needs to strengthen air defense. He spoke about the situation at the front and Ukrainian long-range sanctions. Our middle strikes and deep strikes quite rightly force Russia...
description_uk: Під час зустрічі з Президентом Гі Пармеленом після прибуття в Женеву подякував Швейцарії за всю надану підтримку і, зокрема, за готовність допомагати в наближенні миру. Поінформував пана Президента про постійні російські атаки й наші потреби для посилення ППО. Розповів про ситуацію на фронті та українські далекобійні санкції. Наші мідлстрайки та дипстрайки цілком справедливо змушують Росію...

description_uk: Міністр Андрій Сибіга: Україна скликає термінові засідання Ради Безпеки ООН, а також відповідні кроки в межах ОБСЄ, Ради Європи та ЮНЕСКО у звʼязку з черговими атаками Росії проти України 💬 "Київ, Харків, Дніпро та інші міста зазнали сильних атак.
